scoping.selected_writer_rationale: The load procedure is the selected writer even though it delegates cross-database work to a helper.

classification.rationale: Surrogate key (identity) + separate natural key column structure indicates a standard non-versioned dimension. Catalog shows no versioning columns or unique composite constraints. Writer procedure is opaque (delegates to cross-database procedure), preventing full write-pattern analysis.

primary_key.rationale: Declared primary key and identity column.

natural_key.rationale: EmployeeAlternateKey is the sole non-identity key column, representing the business identifier for employee cross-database profiles.

warnings.message: Writer procedure delegates to cross-database EXEC [ArchiveDB].[silver].[usp_stage_DimCrossDbProfile] with unsupported syntax. Write pattern is opaque; profiling relies on catalog signals and table structure.
Watermark and incremental strategy cannot be determined from opaque procedure. Table structure supports SCD1 classification, but write mechanics remain unverified.
